CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Humanoid loco-manipulation is often simplified into a stop-and-go process: walking to an object, stopping to manipulate it, and then resuming locomotion. It also commonly relies on low degree-of-freedom (DoF) end effectors that behave like an open-close grasp primitive. We introduce CoorDex, a learning pipeline that converts high-dimensional body and dexterous hand control into coordinated latent
articles.summary: 提出CoorDex学习流水线，将人形机器人高维身体与灵巧手控制协调为潜变量，避免传统“停止-操作-行走”的间断模式。实现连续移动操纵，提升自由度，适用于复杂操控场景。

articles.title: VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct
articles.excerpt: Scaling reinforcement learning for visual mathematical reasoning requires more than generating harder questions: as data volume grows, the reward labels themselves must remain reliable. Yet existing data pipelines scale supervision while trusting the labeller, and policy-side methods assume the underlying answers are already correct. We instead treat scaling as a verifiable data-construction probl
articles.summary: 针对多模态数学推理强化学习中数据规模扩大后奖励标签可靠性下降的问题，提出VeriEvol可验证数据构造方法，在扩展监督信号的同时确保答案正确性，提升推理模型的鲁棒性。

articles.title: Self-Compacting Language Model Agents
articles.excerpt: Long agent traces composed of chains of thought and tool calls accumulate stale content that anchor subsequent generations, and eventually outgrow the context window. Existing scaffolds mitigate it with fixed-interval compaction triggered at a token threshold. Such triggers pay no heed to trajectory structure, risking discard of partial results mid-derivation or mid-search. We propose SelfCompact,
articles.summary: 现有长智能体轨迹压缩采用固定令牌阈值触发，可能导致中间结果丢失。提出SelfCompact，利用轨迹结构自适应压缩，保留推导或搜索中的部分成果，提升长程任务效率。

articles.title: Foresight: Failure Detection for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation with Action-Conditioned World Model Latents
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon tasks are common in real-world robotic deployments, yet failure detection for such tasks remains underexplored. Detecting failures in long-horizon robotic tasks is particularly challenging because failure onset is often ambiguous and dense temporal annotations are typically unavailable. We present Foresight, a failure detection framework that monitors manipulation trajectories using l
articles.summary: 提出Foresight故障检测框架，利用动作条件的世界模型潜变量监测长程机器人操作轨迹，无需密集时间标注即可检测早期故障，适用于实际部署中的连续任务。

articles.title: Training Open Models for Agentic Phone Use
articles.excerpt: Phones are becoming an important execution surface for general-purpose agents, but training open models for reliable phone use remains difficult because the environment that matters at deployment, real devices running real apps, is slow, stateful, side-effectful, and hard to reset or verify, while scalable mock environments only approximate real behavior. We present PhoneBuddy, a training recipe a
articles.summary: 针对开放模型手机操作训练中真实设备慢、状态复杂的问题，提出PhoneBuddy训练方案，结合真实环境与可扩展模拟环境，训练出可靠手机代理，提升实用部署能力。

articles.title: Agent-as-a-Router: Agentic Model Routing for Coding Tasks
articles.excerpt: Real-world users typically have access to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from different providers, and these LLMs often excel at distinct domains, yet none dominate all. Consequently, routing each task to the most suitable model becomes critical for both performance and cost. Existing routers treat this as a static, one-off classification problem. However, we identify the performance bottle
articles.summary: 现有多LLM路由视为静态分类，性能受限。提出Agent-as-a-Router，将路由建模为智能体过程，动态感知任务需求和模型擅长领域，提升编程任务的路由精度与成本效益。

articles.title: SingGuard: A Policy-Adaptive Multimodal LLM Guardrail with Dynamic Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in consumer, medical, financial, and enterprise applications. This broad deployment expands the safety surface: risks can arise from multimodal question answering, assistant responses, and cross-modal composition, while moderation policies may vary across products, regions, and deployment stages. Most existing guardrails either rely on fixed
articles.summary: VLM在多领域部署面临安全政策多变问题。提出SingGuard多模态护栏，动态推理适配不同产品/区域政策，检测问答、回复及跨模态组合中的风险，实现政策自适应安全过滤。

articles.title: PolicyTrim: Boosting Intrinsic Policy Efficiency of Vision-Language-Action Models
articles.excerpt: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide a unified paradigm for robotic manipulation, yet their real-world deployment is often bottlenecked by execution efficiency. While existing efforts predominantly focus on compute-centric efficiency to reduce per-step inference latency, the intrinsic policy efficiency of these models remains largely unexplored. Policy efficiency is fundamentally affected b
articles.summary: 针对VLA模型部署中执行效率瓶颈，现有工作聚焦计算延迟，忽视内在策略效率。提出PolicyTrim，通过修剪冗余动作步骤提升策略效率，减少长程操控所需的执行步数。

articles.title: PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems
articles.excerpt: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-XL, an interactive benchmark of 327 retail tasks over 1,6
articles.summary: 现有基准缺乏对检索受限工具可见性下长程规划的评估。提出PlanBench-XL，包含327个零售任务、1600+工具，用于测试LLM代理在大型工具生态中发现工具、推断子目标的能力。
